notes: Compact 画質 chip on every device (2026-06, user 'left-right too wide'). Tightened the chip: gap 6→3px, horizontal padding 9→6px (and an in-row !important override so the <button> isn't re-fattened by the generic toolbar padding on phones), touch font .74→.7em, FPS read-out font .82em. Width: iPad ~97→80px, phone ~85→72px (still shows 🖥 + quality level + live FPS, on one line). Also fixed an FPS wrap that could make the chip double-height (white-space:nowrap + flex-shrink:0, min-width floors it so it doesn't jitter). Top phone row still one line. Builds on v0.0.18.
